title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · Compiler Case: Module Resolution
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts module resolution increment in a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose bundler or NodeNext resolution and trace file, extension, package exports, and type lookup decisions.
Add, deprecate, and migrate variants with compatibility tests and consumer impact evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
